name: ESCO TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: ESCO Technologies Inc. provides highly engineered components and systems for aviation, Navy, defense and industrial customers, designs and manufactures radio frequency test and measurement products, and offers diagnostic instruments, software and services to electric utility and renewable energy industries.

exposures.sentence: We are: A global provider of highly engineered components and systems for aviation, Navy, defense and industrial customers;

The companies within this segment primarily design and manufacture specialty filtration, fluid control and naval products, including hydraulic filter elements, fluid control devices and precision-tolerance machined components used in aerospace and defense applications.

Doble is an industry leader in the development, manufacture and delivery of diagnostic testing and data management solutions that enable electric power grid operators to assess the integrity of high-voltage, high-current and high-power delivery equipment.
NRG is a global market leader in the design and manufacture of decision support tools for the renewable energy industry, primarily wind and solar.
ETS-Lindgren... serves the medical, health and safety, electronics, wireless communications, automotive and defense markets.
ETS-Lindgren... serves the medical, health and safety, electronics, wireless communications, automotive and defense markets.
A provider of diagnostic instruments, software and services to industrial power users and the electric utility and renewable energy industries.
Cybersecurity Incidents and Related Data Breaches or Other Disruptions of Our Information Technology Systems Could Adversely Affect Our Business.

catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we acquired the Signature Management & Power ( SM&P ) business of Ultra Electronics Holdings Limited, comprising Ultra PMES Limited (subsequently renamed as PMES I Limited), a private limited company incorporated in England and Wales, Measurement Systems, Inc., a Delaware corporation, EMS Development Corporation, a New York corporation, and DNE Technologies, Inc., a Delaware corporation.
In July 2025, following a strategic review of our Space business, we completed the sale of our former A&D subsidiary VACCO Industries (VACCO) for net sales proceeds of approximately $270 million.

catalysts.event: 64% of backlog expected to be completed in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: Of our total backlog at September 30, 2025, approximately 64% is expected to be completed in the fiscal year ending September 30, 2026.
